info.name: Amazon Neptune Data API
info.description:
Amazon Neptune Data API provides SDK support for more than 40 data operations including data loading, query execution, data inquiry, and machine learning. It supports Gremlin and openCypher query languages and provides programmatic access to Neptune graph data through AWS SDKs.

Contact Support:
 Name: Amazon Web Services

item.name: gremlin
explain
Amazon Neptune Get the Execution Plan for a Gremlin Query

request.description: Executes a Gremlin explain query against the Neptune graph database. Returns the query execution plan without actually running the query against the data.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: profile
Amazon Neptune Profile a Gremlin Query Execution

request.description: Executes a Gremlin profile query against the Neptune graph database. Returns the query execution plan along with actual runtime statistics including execution time and intermediate result counts.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: status
{queryId}
Amazon Neptune Get the Status of a Specific Gremlin Query

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier of the Gremlin query.

request.description: Gets the status of a specific Gremlin query by its query ID.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Amazon Neptune Cancel a Running Gremlin Query

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier of the Gremlin query to cancel.

request.description: Cancels a running Gremlin query by its query ID.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Amazon Neptune Get the Status of Gremlin Queries

request.description: Gets the status of running and waiting Gremlin queries. Returns a list of active queries with their query IDs and statuses.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Amazon Neptune Execute a Gremlin Query via the Data API

request.description: Executes a Gremlin query against the Neptune graph database using the Data API. The query is submitted as a JSON payload and results are returned synchronously.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

response.name: Bad request - malformed query or invalid parameters.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: sparql
status
Amazon Neptune Get the Status of SPARQL Queries

request.description: Gets the status of running and waiting SPARQL queries.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: statistics
Amazon Neptune Get SPARQL RDF Statistics

request.description: Returns statistics for the RDF data stored in the Neptune database, including triple counts and predicate distributions.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Amazon Neptune Manage SPARQL RDF Statistics

request.description: Starts or deletes statistics generation for the RDF data.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: stream
Amazon Neptune Get SPARQL RDF Change Stream Records

query.description: Maximum number of records to return (1-100000, default 10).
The stream position to start reading from.
The commit number to start from.
The operation sequence number within the commit.

request.description: Gets a stream of change-log entries for RDF data. Each entry records a mutation (add, remove) made to the RDF triples.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

query.description: Maximum number of records to return (1-100000, default 10).
The stream position to start reading from.
The commit number to start from.
The operation sequence number within the commit.

item.name: Amazon Neptune Execute a SPARQL Query via the Data API

urlencoded.description: The SPARQL query string (for SELECT, ASK, CONSTRUCT, DESCRIBE).
The SPARQL update string (for INSERT, DELETE operations).

request.description: Executes a SPARQL query against the Neptune RDF graph database using the Data API. Supports SELECT, ASK, CONSTRUCT, and DESCRIBE queries.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

urlencoded.description: The SPARQL query string (for SELECT, ASK, CONSTRUCT, DESCRIBE).
The SPARQL update string (for INSERT, DELETE operations).

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

The SPARQL update string (for INSERT, DELETE operations).

variable.description: (Required) The unique identifier of the load job to cancel.

request.description: Cancels an in-progress bulk loader job by its load ID.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Amazon Neptune Start a Bulk Loader Job

request.description: Initiates a bulk data loading job from Amazon S3 into the Neptune database. Supports CSV for property graphs and multiple RDF formats.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Amazon Neptune List Bulk Loader Jobs

query.description: Maximum number of load IDs to return.
Whether to include queued loads in the response.

request.description: Returns a list of Neptune bulk loader job IDs. Neptune tracks the most recent 1,024 bulk load jobs.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

query.description: Maximum number of load IDs to return.
Whether to include queued loads in the response.

item.name: Amazon Neptune Start an ML Data Processing Job

request.description: Creates a new Neptune ML data processing job that prepares graph data for model training using Amazon SageMaker.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Amazon Neptune List ML Data Processing Jobs

query.description: Maximum number of items to return (default 10, max 1024).
The ARN of the IAM role for Neptune access.

request.description: Returns a list of active Neptune ML data processing job IDs.

response.name: Data processing job list retrieved successfully.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

query.description: Maximum number of items to return (default 10, max 1024).
The ARN of the IAM role for Neptune access.
